examples.title: VAE Training Loop
examples.code:
FOR epoch IN epochs:
  x = sample_data()
  μ, σ = encoder(x)
  ϵ ~ N(0,I)
  z = μ + σ*ϵ
  x̂ = decoder(z)
  loss = ||x-x̂||² + KL(N(μ,σ²) || N(0,I))
  update_params(loss)
examples.explanation: Shows key steps: encoding, sampling via reparameterization, decoding, and ELBO loss calculation
